log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Leonin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:5+3=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:9+-2=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Leonin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! 7 psychic damage. HP: 52/59
→ ⚠ Ogre: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Leonin — Bardic Musician HP: 53/67
→ Leonin — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 7 vs DC 10]
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Leonin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).

Frost Giant attacks Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Leonin — Bardic Musician HP: 32/67
Frost Giant attacks Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Leonin — Bardic Musician HP: 2/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:3+6=9 vs AC 14] MISS.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Leonin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Leonin — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:5+6=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:3+9=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:2+9=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Leonin — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:13+6=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Leonin — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
